dleplugin.name: DLE Native Forum (Ultimate Core v1.2.0)
dleplugin.description: Dlehub Özel - Güvenlik Kalkanı, Rep Oyunlaştırma, Otomatik Grup Terfisi, Anti-Spam, TPL Tabanlı Refactoring, Admin Panel Çevirileri
dleplugin.mysqlenable: INSERT IGNORE INTO `{prefix}_admin_sections` (`name`, `title`, `descr`, `icon`, `allow_groups`) VALUES ('forum', 'Forum Yönetimi', 'DLE Native Forum', 'forum.png', '1');

operation.replacecode:
<?php
/*
=====================================================
 DLE Native Forum (Nexus) - by Dlehub
-----------------------------------------------------
 Copyright (c) 2024-2026 Dlehub & Elegance
=====================================================
 File: engine/forum/actions/pm.php
-----------------------------------------------------
 v1.2.5+ - Forum PM artık DLE native conversations
 sistemine yönlendiriyor. Eski forum_pm tablosu
 kaldırıldı, ayrı forum PM yoktur.
=====================================================
*/
if(!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

// Giriş yapmamış kullanıcıyı da doğrudan DLE PM'e yönlendir
if(!$is_logged) {
    header("Location: " . $config['http_home_url'] . "index.php?do=pm");
    die();
}

// DLE'nin kendi PM sistemine yönlendir
$redirect_url = isset($_GET['sub'])
    ? $config['http_home_url'] . "index.php?do=pm&action=" . preg_replace('/[^a-z]/', '', $_GET['sub'])
    : $config['http_home_url'] . "index.php?do=pm";

header("Location: " . $redirect_url);
die();
?>

<?php
if(!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

if(!$is_logged) { msgbox(fl('forum_error'), fl('forum_err_login_notif')); return; }

$Forum->markNotifsRead();
$notifs = $Forum->getNotifs($Forum->getUserId(), 50) ?: [];

$notif_type_map = [
    'reply'   => ['icon' => 'fa-reply',     'color' => '#475569'],
    'like'    => ['icon' => 'fa-thumbs-up', 'color' => '#f59e0b'],
    'pm'      => ['icon' => 'fa-envelope',  'color' => '#8b5cf6'],
    'mention' => ['icon' => 'fa-at',        'color' => '#10b981'],
];

$notif_html = '';

if(empty($notifs)) {
    $tpl->load_template('forum/blocks/empty.tpl');
    $tpl->set('{empty_msg}', fl('forum_no_notifs'));
    $tpl->compile('empty_block');
    $notif_html = $tpl->result['empty_block'];
} else {
    $tpl->load_template('forum/blocks/notif_row.tpl');
    foreach($notifs as $n) {
        $type  = $n['type'] ?: 'reply';
        $lbl   = $notif_type_map[$type] ?? $notif_type_map['reply'];
        $from  = htmlspecialchars($n['from_name'] ?: 'Biri');
        $topic = htmlspecialchars($n['topic_title'] ?: fl('forum_deleted_topic'));
        $ndate = date('d.m.Y H:i', strtotime($n['date']));
        $lbl_text = fl('forum_notif_' . $type, $type);

        if($n['topic_title']) {
            $topic_url = forum_url('forum_topic', ['newsid' => intval($n['topic_id'])]);
            if($n['post_id']) $topic_url .= '#post-' . intval($n['post_id']);
            $tpl->set('{notif_url}', $topic_url);
            $tpl->set_block("'\\[has-link\\](.*?)\\[/has-link\\]'si", "\\1");
            $tpl->set_block("'\\[no-link\\](.*?)\\[/no-link\\]'si",   "");
        } else {
            $tpl->set('{notif_url}', '#');
            $tpl->set_block("'\\[has-link\\](.*?)\\[/has-link\\]'si", "");
            $tpl->set_block("'\\[no-link\\](.*?)\\[/no-link\\]'si",   "\\1");
        }

        $tpl->set('{notif_icon}',   $lbl['icon']);
        $tpl->set('{notif_color}',  $lbl['color']);
        $tpl->set('{notif_from}',   $from);
        $tpl->set('{notif_action}', $lbl_text);
        $tpl->set('{notif_topic}',  $topic);
        $tpl->set('{notif_date}',   $ndate);

        $tpl->compile('notif_row_block');
        $notif_html .= $tpl->result['notif_row_block'];
    }
}

$tpl->load_template('forum/notifications.tpl');
$tpl->set('{notif_content}', $notif_html);
$tpl->set('{SITEURL}',       $config['http_home_url']);
$tpl->set('{forum_url}',     forum_url('forum_main'));
$tpl->set('{breadcrumb}',    $Forum->getBreadcrumb(0, 0, fl('forum_notifications')));
$tpl->set('{forum_js_vars}', $Forum->getJsVars());
$tpl->compile('content');
$tpl->clear();

define('KSEARCH',  false);
define('RSSPARSE', false);
$metatags['title'] = fl('forum_notifications') . ' - ' . fl('forum_forum');
?>

getCats(0) ?: []; $stats = $Forum->getStats(); $online_count = $Forum->getOnlineCount() ?: 0; $noavatar = rtrim($config['http_home_url'], '/') . '/templates/' . $config['skin'] . db = $db; $this->user = $user; $this->config = $config; $this->user_group = $user_group; } /** * Dinamik ve dile duyarlı Breadcrumb (Ekmek Kırıntısı) oluşturur * @param int $cat_id Kategori ID (isteğe bağlı) * @param int $topic_id Konu ID (isteğe bağlı) * @param string $custom Özel başlık (isteğe bağlı) * @return string HTML Breadcrumb */ public function getBreadcrumb($cat_id = 0, $topic_id = 0, $custom = '') { $parts = []; // 1. Ana Sayfa (DLE Ana Sayfası) - Dinamik Metin $home_text = fl('forum_home', 'Ana Sayfa'); $parts[] = '' . $home_text . ''; // 2. Forum Ana Sayfası $parts[] = '' . fl('forum_forum') . ''; // 3. Kategori Hiyerarşisi (Loop Safety: $safety < 20) if ($cat_id > 0) { $current_cat_id = intval($cat_id); $cat_path = []; $safety = 0; while ($current_cat_id > 0 && $safety < 20) { $safety++; $cat = $this->getCatById($current_cat_id); if (!$cat) break; array_unshift($cat_path, '' . htmlspecialchars($cat['name']) . ''); $current_cat_id = intval($cat['parent_id']); } $parts = array_merge($parts, $cat_path); } // 4. Konu Başlığı veya Özel Sayfa Başlığı if ($topic_id > 0) { $topic = $this->getTopicById($topic_id); if ($topic) { $parts[] = '' . htmlspecialchars($topic['title']) . ''; } } elseif ($custom) { $parts[] = '' . htmlspecialchars($custom) . ''; } $sep = ''; return '
' . implode($sep, $parts) . '
'; } public function makeSlug($title) { return totranslit($title, true, false); } public function isLogged() { return !empty($this->user['user_id']); } /** * Gelişmiş flood kontrolü: user-based + IP-based + saatlik rate limit */ private function getForumSetting($key, $default = null) { return $this->getSetting($key) ?? $default; } public function checkFloodPublic($action, $wait_seconds = 30) { if (!method_exists($this, 'checkFlood')) { return false; } return $this->checkFlood($action, $wait_seconds); } private function checkFlood($action, $wait_seconds = 30) { $user_id = $this->getUserId(); $ip = $this->db->safesql($_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR'] ?? '0.0.0.0'); $now = time(); // 1. Flood kontrolü (Misafirler için IP, Üyeler için UserID) if ($user_id <= 0) { $row = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT last_action, count, blocked_until FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_flood WHERE ip='$ip' AND action='$action' LIMIT 1" ); $where = "ip='$ip' AND action='$action'"; } else { $row = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT last_action, count, blocked_until FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_flood WHERE user_id=$user_id AND action='$action' LIMIT 1" ); $where = "user_id=$user_id AND action='$action'"; } if($row) { // Blok süresi dolmadıysa reddet if(intval($row['blocked_until']) > $now) { $remaining = intval($row['blocked_until']) - $now; return ['error' => fl('err_flood_post', $remaining)]; } // Flood süresi içindeyse say if(($now - intval($row['last_action'])) < $wait_seconds) { $count = intval($row['count']) + 1; // 5 kez flood → 10 dakika blok $blocked = ($count >= 5) ? ($now + 600) : 0; $this->db->query( "UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_flood SET last_action='$now', count='$count', blocked_until='$blocked' WHERE $where" ); if($blocked) { return ['error' => fl('err_flood_blocked')]; } $wait = $wait_seconds - ($now - intval($row['last_action'])); return ['error' => fl('err_flood_post', $wait)]; } // Normal güncelle $this->db->query( "UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_flood SET last_action='$now', count='1', blocked_until='0' WHERE $where" ); } else { $this->db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_flood (user_id, ip, action, last_action, count, blocked_until) VALUES ('$user_id', '$ip', '$action', '$now', '1', '0')" ); } // 2. IP bazlı saatlik rate limit $ip_count = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_flood WHERE ip='$ip' AND action='$action' AND last_action > " . ($now - 3600) ); $hourly_limit = intval($this->getForumSetting('flood_max_per_hour') ?? 30); if($ip_count && intval($ip_count['c']) > $hourly_limit) { return ['error' => fl('err_flood_ip')]; } return true; } public function getUserId() { return intval($this->user['user_id']); } /** * Çevrimiçi istatistikleri - Cache'li (5 dk), tek sorgulu * {prefix}_session tablosu: member_id > 0 = üye, member_id = 0 = misafir * * @return array ['total' => int, 'members' => int, 'guests' => int, 'timestamp' => int] */ public function getOnlineStats() { $cacheKey = "forum_online_stats"; $cached = dle_cache($cacheKey, $this->config['skin']); if ($cached) { $data = unserialize($cached); if (is_array($data) && isset($data['timestamp']) && (time() - intval($data['timestamp'])) < 300) { return $data; } } // DLE'nin kendi online kontrol mantığını kullan // config.php'de tanımlı online süresi $online_time = time() - intval($this->config['online_time'] ?? 300); // lastdate varchar tipinde, UNIX timestamp string olarak tutuluyor $total = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE lastdate > '$online_time' AND lastdate REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'" ); $members = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE lastdate > '$online_time' AND lastdate REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND user_group > 0 AND user_group < 5" ); $total_count = intval($total['c'] ?? 0); $members_count = intval($members['c'] ?? 0); $stats = [ 'total' => $total_count, 'members' => $members_count, 'guests' => max(0, $total_count - $members_count), 'timestamp' => time() ]; create_cache($cacheKey, serialize($stats), $this->config['skin']); return $stats; } /** * Ziyaretçiyi logla - 15 dakika interval kontrolü * Sadece forum sayfalarında çağrılır */ public function logVisitor() { $user_id = $this->getUserId(); $ip = $this->db->safesql($_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR'] ?? '0.0.0.0'); $page = $this->db->safesql($_SERVER['REQUEST_URI'] ?? ''); // Aynı IP'den son 15 dakikada kayıt varsa tekrar ekleme $exists = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_visitors WHERE ip = '$ip' AND date > NOW() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE LIMIT 1" ); if (!$exists) { $this->db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_visitors (user_id, ip, page, date) VALUES ('$user_id', '$ip', '$page', NOW())" ); } } /** * Bugünkü tekil ziyaretçi sayısı - Cache'li (1 saat) * * @return array ['total_visitors' => int, 'members' => int, 'guests' => int, 'timestamp' => int] */ public function getTodayVisitors() { $cacheKey = "forum_today_visitors"; $cached = dle_cache($cacheKey, $this->config['skin']); if ($cached) { $data = unserialize($cached); if (is_array($data) && isset($data['timestamp']) && (time() - intval($data['timestamp'])) < 3600) { return $data; } } // Tek sorguda: toplam tekil IP, tekil üye, tekil misafir $row = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ip) as total_visitors, COUNT(DISTINCT IF(user_id > 0, user_id, NULL)) as members, COUNT(DISTINCT IF(user_id = 0, ip, NULL)) as guests FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_visitors WHERE date >= CURDATE()" ); $stats = [ 'total_visitors' => intval($row['total_visitors'] ?? 0), 'members' => intval($row['members'] ?? 0), 'guests' => intval($row['guests'] ?? 0), 'timestamp' => time() ]; create_cache($cacheKey, serialize($stats), $this->config['skin']); return $stats; } public function getOnlineCount() { $time = time() - 300; $r = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE lastdate > '$time'"); return intval($r['c']); } public function canDo($perm, $cat_id = 0) { $group = intval($this->user['user_group']); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); // Süper admin her şeyi yapabilir if($group == 1) return true; // Kategori bazlı rol kontrolü (Integer tırnakları kaldırıldı) if($cat_id > 0 && $user_id > 0) { $cat_id = intval($cat_id); $role_row = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT role FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_roles WHERE cat_id=$cat_id AND user_id=$user_id LIMIT 1" ); if($role_row) { $role = $role_row['role']; if($role === 'banned') return false; if($role === 'admin' || $role === 'moderator') { // Moderatör izinleri $mod_perms = ['moderate','lock_topic','pin_topic','delete_any','reply_topic','edit_own','delete_own','view_forum']; if(in_array($perm, $mod_perms)) return true; } } } // Kategori gizlilik kontrolü if($cat_id > 0 && $perm === 'view_forum') { $cat = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT is_private, read_groups, permissions FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats WHERE id='$cat_id' LIMIT 1" ); if($cat && intval($cat['is_private']) === 1) { // Özel kategori - read_groups kontrol $allowed_groups = array_filter(array_map('intval', explode(',', $cat['read_groups']))); if(!empty($allowed_groups) && !in_array($group, $allowed_groups)) { return false; } } } // Yazma izni için write_groups kontrolü if($cat_id > 0 && in_array($perm, ['create_topic','reply_topic'])) { $cat = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT is_private, write_groups FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats WHERE id='$cat_id' LIMIT 1" ); if($cat && !empty($cat['write_groups'])) { $write_groups = array_filter(array_map('intval', explode(',', $cat['write_groups']))); if(!empty($write_groups) && !in_array($group, $write_groups)) { return false; } } } // Standart DLE grup bazlı izinler $allowed = [ 'view_forum' => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7], 'create_topic' => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 'reply_topic' => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 'edit_own' => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 'delete_own' => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 'moderate' => [1, 2], 'send_pm' => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 'lock_topic' => [1, 2], 'pin_topic' => [1, 2], 'delete_any' => [1, 2], ]; return isset($allowed[$perm]) && in_array($group, $allowed[$perm]); } public function csrfToken() { global $dle_login_hash; return $dle_login_hash; } public function verifyCsrf($token) { global $dle_login_hash; if(empty($token) || empty($dle_login_hash)) return false; return hash_equals((string)$dle_login_hash, (string)$token); } /** * Girdi temizleme - v1.2.0 Güvenlik İyileştirmesi * Girdiyi ParseFilter::process() veya BB_Parse() ile sanitize eder. */ public function sanitizeInput($text) { global $config, $user_group, $member_id; if(!class_exists('ParseFilter')) { include_once(DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/classes/parse.class.php')); } // DLE Core addcomments.php:24-38 — Forum editörü HER ZAMAN TinyMCE (WYSIWYG) kullanıyor // Bu yüzden allowed_tags ile ParseFilter oluşturulmalı ki HTMLPurifier HTML'i silmesin $allowed_tags = array( 'dlehide[class|data-allowed-groups|contenteditable]', 'div[align|style|class|data-commenttime|data-commentuser|data-commentid|data-commentpostid|data-commentgast|contenteditable]', 'span[style|class|data-userurl|data-username|contenteditable]', 'p[align|style|class]', 'pre[class]', 'code', 'br', 'strong', 'em', 'ul', 'li', 'ol', 'b', 'u', 'i', 's', 'hr' ); $allow_url = $user_group[$member_id['user_group']]['allow_url'] ?? true; $allow_image = $user_group[$member_id['user_group']]['allow_image'] ?? true; if($allow_url) $allowed_tags[] = 'a[href|target|style|class|title]'; if($allow_image) $allowed_tags[] = 'img[style|class|src|srcset|alt|width|height]'; $parse = new ParseFilter($allowed_tags); $parse->wysiwyg = true; $parse->safe_mode = true; $parse->remove_html = false; $parse->allow_url = $allow_url; $parse->allow_image = $allow_image; $parse->allow_video = $user_group[$member_id['user_group']]['video_comments'] ?? false; $parse->allow_media = $user_group[$member_id['user_group']]['media_comments'] ?? false; // DLE Core addcomments.php:155 — process() + BB_Parse() $text = $parse->BB_Parse($parse->process(trim($text))); return $text; } public function getSetting($name) { $row = $this->db->super_query("SELECT value FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_settings WHERE name = '" . $this->db->safesql($name) . "'"); return $row ? $row['value'] : null; } public function getJsVars() { global $dle_login_hash, $config; $ajax_url = forum_url('forum_ajax'); return ""; } public function getCats($parent_id = 0) { $cacheKey = "forum_cats_" . intval($parent_id); $cached = dle_cache($cacheKey, $this->config['skin']); if($cached) return unserialize($cached); $pid = intval($parent_id); $cats = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats WHERE parent_id = '$pid' ORDER BY posi ASC", true ); create_cache($cacheKey, serialize($cats), $this->config['skin']); return $cats; } public function getCatBySlug($slug) { $slug = $this->db->safesql($slug); return $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts lp ON lp.id = t.last_post_id LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts lp ON lp.id = t.last_post_id LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_forum_posts (topic_id, user_id, text, ip, date, is_approved) VALUES ('$topic_id', '$user_id', '$text_db', '$ip', NOW(), '$is_approved')"); $post_id = $this->db->insert_id(); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET last_post_id = '$post_id', last_user_id = '$user_id' WHERE id = '$topic_id'"); if($is_approved) { $this->addPoints($user_id, intval($this->getSetting('points_new_topic') ?: 10)); $this->updatePostCount($user_id); $this->updateCatStats($cat_id); clear_cache("forum_topics_" . $cat_id); } $this->db->query("COMMIT"); } catch (\Exception $e) { $this->db->query("ROLLBACK"); return ['error' => fl('forum_err_db') . $e->getMessage()]; } // DÜZELTME: Mentionlar HAM text üzerinden aranmalı $this->parseMentions($text, $topic_id, $post_id); $result = ['success' => true, 'topic_id' => $topic_id, 'post_id' => $post_id, 'slug' => $slug]; if(!$is_approved) { $result['pending'] = true; $result['message'] = fl('forum_ok_approval_pending'); } return $result; } public function lockTopic($topic_id, $state = 1) { if(!$this->canDo('lock_topic')) return false; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $state = $state ? 1 : 0; $this->db->query("UPDATE " . "_forum_posts (topic_id, user_id, text, ip, date, is_approved) VALUES ('$topic_id', '$user_id', '$text_safe', '$ip', NOW(), '$is_approved')"); $post_id = $this->db->insert_id(); if(!$is_approved) { $this->db->query("COMMIT"); return ['success' => true, 'post_id' => $post_id, 'pending' => true, 'message' => fl('forum_ok_approval_pending')]; } $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET replies = replies + 1, last_post_id = '$post_id', last_user_id = '$user_id', last_post_date = NOW() WHERE id = '$topic_id'"); $this->updateCatStats($topic['cat_id']); $this->addPoints($user_id, intval($this->getSetting('points_new_reply') ?: 2)); $this->updatePostCount($user_id); $this->updateUserRank($user_id); $this->db->query("COMMIT"); } catch (\Exception $e) { $this->db->query("ROLLBACK"); return ['error' => fl('forum_err_db') . $e->getMessage()]; } $subs = $this->db->super_query("SELECT user_id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs WHERE topic_id = '$topic_id'", true); foreach($subs as $sub) { $this->sendNotif($sub['user_id'], 'reply', $topic_id, $post_id); } $this->sendNotif($topic['user_id'], 'reply', $topic_id, $post_id); $this->parseMentions($text, $topic_id, $post_id); clear_cache("forum_topics_" . $topic['cat_id']); return ['success' => true, 'post_id' => $post_id]; } public function editPost($post_id, $new_text) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; $post_id = intval($post_id); $post = $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . Aksi SQL syntax error verir. $old_text_safe = $this->db->safesql($post['text']); $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "', '$old_text_safe', NOW())"); $new_text_safe = $this->db->safesql($new_text); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET text = '$new_text_safe', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '$post_id'"); if($own) $this->logAction('edit_own_post', $post['topic_id'], $post_id); else $this->logAction('edit_post_as_mod', $post['topic_id'], $post_id); clear_cache('forum_sticky_' . $post['topic_id']); return ['success' => true]; } public function deletePost($post_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; $post_id = intval($post_id); $post = $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id' AND is_deleted = '0'"); if(!$post) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_post_not_found')]; $own = $post['user_id'] == $this->getUserId(); if(!$own && !$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]; $topic_id = intval($post['topic_id']); $topic = $this->getTopicById($topic_id); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET is_deleted = '1' WHERE id = '$post_id'"); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET replies = GREATEST(replies - 1, 0) WHERE id = '$topic_id'"); if($topic && $topic['last_post_id'] == $post_id) { $new_last = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id, user_id, date FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE topic_id='$topic_id' AND is_deleted='0' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1"); if($new_last) { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET last_post_id='{$new_last['id']}', last_user_id='{$new_last['user_id']}', last_post_date='{$new_last['date']}' WHERE id='$topic_id'"); } else { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET last_post_id='0', last_user_id='0', last_post_date=NOW() WHERE id='$topic_id'"); } $this->updateCatStats($topic['cat_id']); } $this->logAction('delete_post', $topic_id, $post_id); clear_cache('forum_sticky_' . $topic_id); return ['success' => true]; } public function toggleLike($post_id, $type = 'like') { if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; $post_id = intval($post_id); $type = ($type === 'dislike') ? 'dislike' : 'like'; $user_id = $this->getUserId(); // Like flood koruması $flood_result = $this->checkFlood('like', 2); if($flood_result !== true) return $flood_result; $post = $this->db->super_query("SELECT user_id, topic_id, likes, dislikes FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id' AND is_deleted = '0'"); if(!$post) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_post_not_found')]; if($post['user_id'] == $user_id) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_own_like')]; $check = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id, type FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_likes WHERE post_id = '$post_id' AND user_id = '$user_id'"); if($check) { if($check['type'] === $type) { $this->db->query("DELETE FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_likes WHERE id = '{$check['id']}'"); $field = ($type === 'like') ? 'likes' : 'dislikes'; $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET $field = GREATEST($field - 1, 0) WHERE id = '$post_id'"); $counts = $this->db->super_query("SELECT likes, dislikes FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id'"); return ['status' => 'removed', 'type' => $type, 'likes' => intval($counts['likes']), 'dislikes' => intval($counts['dislikes'])]; } else { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_likes SET type = '$type' WHERE id = '{$check['id']}'"); if($type === 'like') { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET likes = likes + 1, dislikes = GREATEST(dislikes - 1, 0) WHERE id = '$post_id'"); } else { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET dislikes = dislikes + 1, likes = GREATEST(likes - 1, 0) WHERE id = '$post_id'"); } $counts = $this->db->super_query("SELECT likes, dislikes FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id'"); $status = ($type === 'like') ? 'liked' : 'disliked'; return ['status' => $status, 'type' => $type, 'likes' => intval($counts['likes']), 'dislikes' => intval($counts['dislikes'])]; } } else { $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_likes (post_id, user_id, type, date) VALUES ('$post_id', '$user_id', '$type', NOW())"); if($type === 'like') { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = '$post_id'"); $this->addPoints($post['user_id'], intval($this->getSetting('points_received_like') ?: 5)); $this->sendNotif($post['user_id'], 'like', $post['topic_id'], $post_id); $this->updateUserRank($post['user_id']); } else { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET dislikes = dislikes + 1 WHERE id = '$post_id'"); } $counts = $this->db->super_query("SELECT likes, dislikes FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id'"); $status = ($type === 'like') ? 'liked' : 'disliked'; return ['status' => $status, 'type' => $type, 'likes' => intval($counts['likes']), 'dislikes' => intval($counts['dislikes'])]; } } public function toggleFollow($topic_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); $check = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs WHERE topic_id = '$topic_id' AND user_id = '$user_id'"); if($check) { $this->db->query("DELETE FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs WHERE id = '{$check['id']}'"); return ['status' => 'unfollowed']; } else { $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs (topic_id, user_id, date) VALUES ('$topic_id', '$user_id', NOW())"); return ['status' => 'followed']; } } public function isFollowing($topic_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return false; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); return (bool)$this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs WHERE topic_id = '$topic_id' AND user_id = '$user_id'"); } public function sendNotif($to_user, $type, $topic_id, $post_id = 0, $extra = []) { $to_user = intval($to_user); $from_user = $this->getUserId(); if($to_user == $from_user || $to_user <= 0) return; $dup = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs WHERE user_id = '$to_user' AND from_user = '$from_user' AND type = '" . $this->db->safesql($type) . "' AND topic_id = '" . intval($topic_id) . "' AND date > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR"); if($dup) return; // JSON payload - genişletilebilir bildirim verisi $payload_data = [ 'type' => $type, 'topic_id' => intval($topic_id), 'post_id' => intval($post_id), ]; // Ek veri varsa payload'a ekle (quote, mention, system) if(isset($extra) && is_array($extra)) { $payload_data = array_merge($payload_data, $extra); } $payload_json = $this->db->safesql(json_encode($payload_data, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)); $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs (user_id, from_user, type, topic_id, post_id, payload, date) VALUES ('$to_user', '$from_user', '" . $this->db->safesql($type) . "', '" . intval($topic_id) . "', '" . intval($post_id) . "', '$payload_json', NOW())"); } public function notifyQuote($to_user, $topic_id, $post_id, $quote_preview = '') { $this->sendNotif($to_user, 'quote', $topic_id, $post_id, [ 'preview' => mb_substr(strip_tags($quote_preview), 0, 100), ]); } public function notifyMention($to_user, $topic_id, $post_id) { $this->sendNotif($to_user, 'mention', $topic_id, $post_id); } public function notifySystem($to_user, $message, $link = '') { $from_user = 0; $to_user = intval($to_user); if($to_user <= 0) return; $payload_json = $this->db->safesql(json_encode([ 'type' => 'system', 'message' => mb_substr($message, 0, 255), 'link' => $link, ], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)); $this->db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs n LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = n.from_user LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t ON t.id = n.topic_id WHERE n.user_id = '$uid' ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT " . intval($limit), true ); } public function countUnreadNotifs() { if(!$this->isLogged()) return 0; $uid = $this->getUserId(); $r = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs WHERE user_id = '$uid' AND is_read = '0'"); return intval($r['c']); } public function markNotifsRead() { $uid = $this->getUserId(); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs SET is_read = '1' WHERE user_id = '$uid'"); } public function isUnread($topic_id, $last_post_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return false; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); // Integer optimizasyonu yapıldı $log = $this->db->super_query("SELECT last_read_post FROM " . PREFIX . PREFIX . "_forum_readlog (user_id, topic_id, last_read_post, date) VALUES ('$user_id', '$topic_id', '$last_post_id', '$now') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_read_post='$last_post_id', date='$now'" ); } public function markCatAsRead($cat_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return; $cat_id = intval($cat_id); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s'); // Kategorideki tüm konuları okunmuş say $topics = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT id, last_post_id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE cat_id='$cat_id' AND is_deleted='0'", true ); if($topics) { foreach($topics as $t) { $tid = intval($t['id']); $lpid = intval($t['last_post_id']); $this->db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_readlog (user_id, topic_id, last_read_post, date) VALUES ('$user_id', '$tid', '$lpid', '$now') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_read_post='$lpid', date='$now'" ); } } } public function cleanReadLog($days = 30) { $days = intval($days); $this->db->query( "DELETE FROM " . "_forum_prefixes $where ORDER BY posi ASC, id ASC", true ); } public function getPrefixById($prefix_id) { $prefix_id = intval($prefix_id); if($prefix_id <= 0) return null; return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_prefixes WHERE id='$prefix_id' LIMIT 1" ); } public function formatPrefix($prefix) { if(!$prefix) return ''; $title = htmlspecialchars($prefix['title'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); $color = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9#]/', '', $prefix['color']); $bg_color = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9#]/', '', $prefix['bg_color']); return "{$title}"; } // === ETİKET (TAG) FONKSIYONLARI === public function getTopicTags($topic_id) { $topic_id = intval($topic_id); return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT t.* FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_tags t JOIN " . PREFIX . PREFIX . "_forum_tags SET count=GREATEST(0,count-1) WHERE id='" . intval($ot['id']) . "'"); } } $this->db->query("DELETE FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topic_tags WHERE topic_id='$topic_id'"); if(empty(trim($tags_str))) return; // Yeni etiketleri işle - max 5 etiket, max 30 karakter $raw_tags = array_slice(array_unique(array_map('trim', explode(',', $tags_str))), 0, 5); foreach($raw_tags as $tag_name) { $tag_name = mb_substr(preg_replace('/[^\p{L}\p{N}\s\-]/u', '', $tag_name), 0, 30); if(mb_strlen($tag_name) < 2) continue; $slug = mb_strtolower(str_replace(' ', '-', $tag_name)); $safe_name = $this->db->safesql($tag_name); $safe_slug = $this->db->safesql($slug); // Etiket yoksa oluştur $this->db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_tags (name, slug, count) VALUES ('$safe_name', '$safe_slug', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE count=count+1, name='$safe_name'" ); $tag_id = $this->db->insert_id(); if(!$tag_id) { $row = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_tags WHERE slug='$safe_slug' LIMIT 1"); $tag_id = $row ? intval($row['id']) : 0; } if($tag_id > 0) { $this->db->query( "INSERT IGNORE INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_topic_tags (topic_id, tag_id) VALUES ('$topic_id', '$tag_id')" ); } } } public function getTopicsByTag($tag_slug, $page = 1, $per_page = 25) { $tag_slug = $this->db->safesql($tag_slug); $per_page = intval($per_page); $offset = (max(1, intval($page)) - 1) * $per_page; // KRİTİK DÜZELTME: c.name as cat_name ve c.alt_name as cat_slug eklendi. // LEFT JOIN _forum_cats eklendi. return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT t.*, u.name as username, u.foto as avatar, c.name as cat_name, c.alt_name as cat_slug FROM " . Sonra puan bazlı rank (for_group = 0 olanlardan) $point_rank = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_users SET forum_rank_id = '$rank_id' WHERE user_id = '$user_id'" ); } public function updatePostCount($user_id) { $user_id = intval($user_id); $cnt = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_complaint WHERE `from` = '$reporter' AND text LIKE '[FORUM]%' AND n_id = '0'" ); if($dup) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_complaint_dup')]; $post = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT p.topic_id, t.title, t.alt_name FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t ON t.id = p.topic_id WHERE p.is_deleted = '0' ORDER BY p.date DESC LIMIT 1" ); $stats = [ 'total_topics' => intval($counts['total_topics']), 'total_posts' => intval($counts['total_posts']), 'total_users' => intval($counts['total_users']), 'forum_members' => intval($counts['forum_members']), 'total_cats' => intval($counts['total_cats']), 'total_likes' => intval($counts['total_likes']), 'total_complaints' => intval($counts['total_complaints']), 'last_user' => $last_user, 'last_post' => $last_post, ]; create_cache("forum_stats", serialize($stats), $this->config['skin']); return $stats; } public function search($query, $page = 1, $per_page = 20) { $q_raw = trim($query); if(mb_strlen($q_raw) < 3) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_search_min')]; // DÜZELTME: LIKE joker karakterleri escape edilmeli $q = $this->db->safesql(str_replace(['%', '_'], ['\%', '\_'], $q_raw)); $offset = (max(1, intval($page)) - 1) * intval($per_page); $results = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT t.id, t.title, t.alt_name, t.date, t.replies, t.views, u.name as username FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . 'uploads/forum/'; if(!is_dir($upload_dir)) { mkdir($upload_dir, 0755, true); $htaccess_content = "\nOrder Allow,Deny\nDeny from all\n\n\nOrder Allow,Deny\nAllow from all\n\nOptions -Indexes\nRemoveHandler .php .phtml .php3 .php4 .php5 .php7 .php8 .cgi .pl .py .jsp .asp .sh .shtml\nRemoveType .php .phtml .php3 .php4 .php5 .php7 .php8 .cgi .pl .py .jsp .asp .sh .shtml"; @file_put_contents($upload_dir . '.htaccess', $htaccess_content); @file_put_contents($upload_dir . 'index.html', ''); } $results = []; $files = $_FILES['forum_file']; $count = is_array($files['name']) ? count($files['name']) : 1; for($i = 0; $i < $count; $i++) { $tmp = is_array($files['tmp_name']) ? $files['tmp_name'][$i] : $files['tmp_name']; $name = is_array($files['name']) ? $files['name'][$i] : $files['name']; $size = is_array($files['size']) ? $files['size'][$i] : $files['size']; $err = is_array($files['error']) ? $files['error'][$i] : $files['error']; if($err !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) { $results[] = ['error' => sprintf(fl('forum_err_upload_error'), $name)]; continue; } if($size > $max_size) { $results[] = ['error' => sprintf(fl('forum_err_upload_size'), $name, round($max_size/1024/1024,1))]; continue; } $ext = strtolower(pathinfo($name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION)); if(!in_array($ext, $allowed_ext)) { $results[] = ['error' => sprintf(fl('forum_err_upload_ext'), $name)]; continue; } // MIME type doğrulaması — sadece uzantıya güvenmek yetmez if(function_exists('finfo_open')) { $finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE); $real_mime = finfo_file($finfo, $tmp); finfo_close($finfo); $allowed_mimes = [ 'jpg' => ['image/jpeg'], 'jpeg' => ['image/jpeg'], 'png' => ['image/png'], 'gif' => ['image/gif'], 'webp' => ['image/webp'], 'pdf' => ['application/pdf'], 'zip' => ['application/zip', 'application/x-zip-compressed'], 'rar' => ['application/x-rar-compressed', 'application/vnd.rar'], 'doc' => ['application/msword'], 'docx' => ['application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document'], ]; if(isset($allowed_mimes[$ext]) && !in_array($real_mime, $allowed_mimes[$ext])) { $results[] = ['error' => sprintf(fl('forum_err_upload_ext'), $name)]; continue; } } $safe_name = time() . '_' . $this->getUserId() . '_' . bin2hex(random_bytes(4)) . '.' . $ext; $dest = $upload_dir . $safe_name; $is_image = in_array($ext, $image_types); if($is_image && function_exists('imagecreatefromstring')) { $src = @imagecreatefromstring(file_get_contents($tmp)); if($src) { $ow = imagesx($src); $oh = imagesy($src); if($ow > 1920 || $oh > 1920) { $r = min(1920/$ow, 1920/$oh); $nw = intval($ow*$r); $nh = intval($oh*$r); $ni = imagecreatetruecolor($nw, $nh); if($ext === 'png') { imagealphablending($ni, false); imagesavealpha($ni, true); } imagecopyresampled($ni, $src, 0,0,0,0,$nw,$nh,$ow,$oh); imagedestroy($src); $src = $ni; } if(function_exists('imagewebp')) { $safe_name = substr($safe_name, 0, strrpos($safe_name, '.')) . '.webp'; $dest = $upload_dir . $safe_name; imagewebp($src, $dest, 82); } else { imagejpeg($src, $dest, 85); } imagedestroy($src); $size = filesize($dest); } else { move_uploaded_file($tmp, $dest); } } else { move_uploaded_file($tmp, $dest); } $fe = strtolower(pathinfo($safe_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION)); $att = $this->saveAttachment($post_id, $topic_id, $safe_name, $name, $size, $fe); $results[] = ['success' => true, 'id' => $att, 'url' => $upload_url . $safe_name, 'name' => $name, 'is_image' => in_array($fe, $image_types) ? 1 : 0]; } return $results; } public function parseMentions($raw_text, $topic_id, $post_id) { preg_match_all('/@([a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]{2,30})/', $raw_text, $m); if(empty($m[1])) return; foreach(array_unique($m[1]) as $uname) { $us = $this->db->safesql($uname); $u = $this->db->super_query("SELECT user_id FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE name='$us'"); if($u) $this->sendNotif(intval($u['user_id']), 'mention', $topic_id, $post_id); } } public function bumpTopic($topic_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $topic = $this->getTopicById($topic_id); if(!$topic) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_topic_not_found')]; if($topic['is_locked']) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_bump_locked')]; $uid = $this->getUserId(); if($topic['user_id'] != $uid && !$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_bump_owner')]; $row = $this->db->super_query("SELECT last_bump_date FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE id='$topic_id'"); if($row && !empty($row['last_bump_date']) && $row['last_bump_date'] != '0000-00-00 00:00:00') { $cooldown = intval($this->getSetting('bump_cooldown_hours') ?: 24) * 3600; if((time() - strtotime($row['last_bump_date'])) < $cooldown) { $kalan = ceil(($cooldown - (time() - strtotime($row['last_bump_date']))) / 3600); return ['error' => sprintf(fl('forum_err_bump_cooldown'), $kalan)]; } } $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET last_post_date=NOW(), last_bump_date=NOW() WHERE id='$topic_id'"); $this->logAction('bump_topic', $topic_id, 0); return ['success' => true, 'message' => fl('forum_ok_bump')]; } public function moveTopic($topic_id, $new_cat_id) { if(!$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $new_cat_id = intval($new_cat_id); $topic = $this->getTopicById($topic_id); if(!$topic) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_topic_not_found')]; if(!$this->getCatById($new_cat_id)) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_move_cat')]; $old = intval($topic['cat_id']); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET cat_id='$new_cat_id' WHERE id='$topic_id'"); $this->updateCatStats($old); $this->updateCatStats($new_cat_id); $this->logAction('move_topic', $topic_id, 0); clear_cache("forum_topics_" . $old); clear_cache("forum_topics_" . $new_cat_id); return ['success' => true]; } public function needsApproval($user_id) { $threshold = intval($this->getSetting('approval_threshold') ?: 0); if($threshold <= 0) return false; $r = $this->db->super_query("SELECT forum_post_count FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE user_id='" . intval($user_id) . "'"); return (intval($r['forum_post_count'] ?? 0) < $threshold); } public function getPendingPosts($page = 1, $per = 20) { $offset = (max(1,$page)-1)*$per; return $this->db->super_query("SELECT p.*, u.name as username, t.title as topic_title FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id=p.user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t ON t.id=p.topic_id WHERE p.is_approved='0' AND p.is_deleted='0' ORDER BY p.date DESC LIMIT $offset,$per", true); } public function countPendingPosts() { return intval($this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE is_approved='0' AND is_deleted='0'")['c']); } public function approvePost($post_id) { if(!$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]; $post_id = intval($post_id); $post = $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id='$post_id'"); if(!$post) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_msg_not_found')]; $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET is_approved='1' WHERE id='$post_id'"); $t = $this->getTopicById($post['topic_id']); if($t) { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET replies = replies + 1, last_post_date=NOW(), last_user_id='{$post['user_id']}', last_post_id='$post_id' WHERE id='{$post['topic_id']}'"); $this->updateCatStats($t['cat_id']); } $this->logAction('approve_post', $post['topic_id'], $post_id); return ['success' => true]; } public function rejectPost($post_id) { if(!$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]; $post_id = intval($post_id); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET is_deleted='1',is_approved='0' WHERE id='$post_id'"); $this->logAction('reject_post', 0, $post_id); return ['success' => true]; } public function pagination($total, $per_page, $current, $base_url) { if($total <= $per_page) return ''; $pages = ceil($total / $per_page); $safe_base_url = htmlspecialchars($base_url, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); $sep = (strpos($safe_base_url, '?') === false) ? '?' : '&'; $html = '
'; if($current > 1) { $html .= ''; } $range = 2; for($i = 1; $i <= $pages; $i++) { if($i == 1 || $i == $pages || ($i >= $current - $range && $i <= $current + $range)) { $active = ($i == $current) ? 'active' : ''; $html .= '' . $i . ''; } elseif ($i == $current - $range - 1 || $i == $current + $range + 1) { $html .= '...'; } } if($current < $pages) { $html .= ''; } $html .= '
'; return $html; } // ============================================================ // v1.2.0 YENİ METOTLAR - FAZ 1, 2, 3 // ============================================================ /** * FAZ 1: Kullanıcının link paylaşma kısıtlamasını kontrol eder. * DLE'nin allow_url grup ayarı + forum_min_posts/forum_min_points ayarlarını kullanır. */ public function checkLinkRestriction($user_id, $text) { // URL regex kontrolü if(!preg_match('#(https?://|www\.|ftp://)[^\s<>\"]+#i', $text)) return true; $user_id = intval($user_id); $min_posts = intval($this->getSetting('link_min_posts') ?: 10); $min_points = intval($this->getSetting('link_min_points') ?: 0); $user = $this->db->super_query("SELECT forum_post_count, forum_points, user_group FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE user_id = '$user_id'"); if(!$user) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; // DLE'nin kendi allow_url kontrolü if(isset($this->user_group[$user['user_group']]['allow_url']) && !$this->user_group[$user['user_group']]['allow_url']) { return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_link_perm')]; } // Forum min_posts kontrolü if($min_posts > 0 && intval($user['forum_post_count']) < $min_posts) { $remaining = $min_posts - intval($user['forum_post_count']); return ['error' => sprintf('Link paylaşabilmek icin en az %d mesaj atmaniz gerekiyor. (Kalan: %d mesaj)', $min_posts, $remaining)]; } // Forum min_points kontrolü if($min_points > 0 && intval($user['forum_points']) < $min_points) { $remaining = $min_points - intval($user['forum_points']); return ['error' => sprintf('Link paylaşabilmek icin en az %d rep puanina sahip olmaniz gerekiyor. (Kalan: %d puan)', $min_points, $remaining)]; } return true; } /** * FAZ 1: Kategori bazlı konu ön onay kontrolü. * Kategorinin require_approval ayarı + kullanıcının moderatör olup olmadığına bakar. */ public function needsTopicApproval($user_id, $cat_id) { $cat_id = intval($cat_id); $user_id = intval($user_id); // Moderatörler ve adminler atlanır if($this->canDo('moderate')) return false; // Global approval_threshold kontrolü if($this->needsApproval($user_id)) return true; // Kategori bazlı kontrol $cat = $this->db->super_query("SELECT require_approval FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats WHERE id = '$cat_id'"); if($cat && intval($cat['require_approval']) === 1) return true; return false; } /** * FAZ 3: Otomatik DLE Grup Terfisi sistemi. * forum_promotion_rules tablosundaki kurallara göre kullanıcı grubunu günceller. */ public function checkGroupPromotion($user_id) { $user_id = intval($user_id); if($user_id <= 0) return; // Terfi sistemi kapalı mı? if(!$this->getSetting('promotion_enabled')) return; // Admin grubu (1) asla terfi edilmez $user = $this->db->super_query("SELECT user_group, forum_points, forum_post_count, forum_total_likes FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE user_id = '$user_id'"); if(!$user || intval($user['user_group']) <= 1) return; $current_group = intval($user['user_group']); $points = intval($user['forum_points']); $posts = intval($user['forum_post_count']); $likes = intval($user['forum_total_likes']); // Aktif kuralları çek (puana göre sıralı) $rules = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_promotion_rules WHERE from_group = '$current_group' AND is_active = '1' ORDER BY required_points ASC", true ); if(!$rules) return; foreach($rules as $rule) { $req_points = intval($rule['required_points']); $req_likes = intval($rule['required_likes']); $req_posts = intval($rule['required_posts']); $to_group = intval($rule['to_group']); // Tüm koşullar sağlanıyor mu? if($points >= $req_points && $likes >= $req_likes && $posts >= $req_posts) { // Grubu güncelle $this->db->query("UPDATE " . USERPREFIX . "_users SET user_group = '$to_group' WHERE user_id = '$user_id' AND user_group = '$current_group'"); // Log kaydı $this->logAction('group_promotion_' . $to_group, 0, 0); // Kullanıcıya bildirim gönder $this->notifySystem($user_id, 'Tebrikler! Forum aktiviteniz sayesinde grubunuz yukseldi!', '' ); // Cache temizle @unlink(ENGINE_DIR . '/cache/system/usergroup.json'); clear_cache(); // ★ GRUP DEĞİŞİNCE RANK DA GÜNCELLENMELİ $this->updateUserRank($user_id); break; // İlk uygun kural uygulanır } } } /** * FAZ 2: Bir sonraki rank bilgisi (Progress Bar için). * Mevcut puan, bir sonraki rank, kalan puan ve yüzde döndürür. */ public function getNextRankInfo($user_id) { $user_id = intval($user_id); $user = $this->db->super_query("SELECT forum_points FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE user_id = '$user_id'"); if(!$user) return null; $points = intval($user['forum_points']); $current_rank = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT id, title, points, color, icon FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_ranks WHERE points <= '$points' ORDER BY points DESC LIMIT 1" ); $next_rank = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT id, title, points, color, icon FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_ranks WHERE points > '$points' ORDER BY points ASC LIMIT 1" ); if(!$next_rank) { // Zaten en yüksek rank return [ 'current' => $current_rank, 'next' => null, 'progress' => 100, 'current_points' => $points ]; } $prev_points = $current_rank ? intval($current_rank['points']) : 0; $next_points = intval($next_rank['points']); $range = $next_points - $prev_points; $current_in_range = $points - $prev_points; $progress = $range > 0 ? min(100, round(($current_in_range / $range) * 100)) : 100; return [ 'current' => $current_rank, 'next' => $next_rank, 'progress' => $progress, 'current_points' => $points, 'remaining' => $next_points - $points ]; } /** * Pending Topics (Onay Bekleyen Konular) - Admin paneli için. */ public function getPendingTopics($page = 1, $per = 20) { $offset = (max(1,$page)-1)*$per; return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT t.*, u.name as username, c.name as cat_name FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats c ON c.id = t.cat_id WHERE t.is_approved = '0' AND t.is_deleted = '0' ORDER BY t.date DESC LIMIT $offset,$per", true); } public function countPendingTopics() { return intval($this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE is_approved='0' AND is_deleted='0'")['c']); } public function approveTopic($topic_id) { if(!$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $topic = $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE id='$topic_id'"); if(!$topic) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_topic_not_found')]; $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET is_approved='1' WHERE id='$topic_id'"); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET is_approved='1' WHERE topic_id='$topic_id'"); // İlk kez onaylandığı için puan ve sayaçları güncelle $user_id = intval($topic['user_id']); $cat_id = intval($topic['cat_id']); $this->addPoints($user_id, intval($this->getSetting('points_new_topic') ?: 10)); $this->updatePostCount($user_id); $this->updateCatStats($cat_id); clear_cache("forum_topics_" . $cat_id); $this->logAction('approve_topic', $topic_id, 0); return ['success' => true]; } public function rejectTopic($topic_id) { if(!$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET is_deleted='1', is_approved='0' WHERE id='$topic_id'"); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET is_deleted='1', is_approved='0' WHERE topic_id='$topic_id'"); $this->logAction('reject_topic', $topic_id, 0); return ['success' => true]; } } ?>

0) ? sprintf($val, ...$args) : ($val ?: $key); } } if(!class_exists('Forum')) { include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '', ['1', '2']); if(!$_is_admin_group) { $_forum_ban = $db->super_query( "SELECT id, reason, contact, expires_at FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_bans WHERE ip='" . $db->safesql($_IP) . "' AND (expires_at = 0 OR expires_at > " . time() . ") LIMIT 1" ); if($_forum_ban) { $ban_msg = htmlspecialchars($_forum_ban['reason'] ?: fl('forum_ban_default_reason', 'Foruma erişiminiz kısıtlanmıştır.')); $ban_contact = $_forum_ban['contact'] ? ' ' . fl('forum_ban_contact', 'İtiraz için:') . ' ' . htmlspecialchars($_forum_ban['contact']) . '' : ''; $ban_exp = $_forum_ban['expires_at'] > 0 ? ' ' . fl('forum_ban_expires', 'Ban bitiş:') . ' ' . date('d.m.Y H:i', intval($_forum_ban['expires_at'])) : ''; msgbox(fl('forum_ban_title', 'Erişim Engellendi'), $ban_msg . $ban_contact . $ban_exp); return; } } $raw_action = (isset($_GET['action']) && is_string($_GET['action'])) ? $_GET['action'] : ((isset($_POST['action']) && is_string($_POST['action'])) ? $_POST['action'] : 'main'); $action = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_]/', '', strtolower($raw_action)); // Günde bir kez eski bildirimleri temizle (30 günden eski) $cleanup_key = "forum_notif_cleanup_" . date('Ymd'); if(!dle_cache($cleanup_key)) { $db->query("DELETE FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs WHERE is_read='1' AND date < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)"); create_cache($cleanup_key, '1'); } switch ($action) { case 'category': include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/main.php')); break; } ?>

<?php
if(!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

function jout($data) {
    header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
    echo json_encode($data, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
    exit;
}

if(!$is_logged) jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]);

 $token = isset($_POST['csrf']) ? trim($_POST['csrf']) : (isset($_POST['user_hash']) ? trim($_POST['user_hash']) : '');
 $act   = isset($_POST['act']) ? $_POST['act'] : '';

if(!$Forum->verifyCsrf($token)) jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_csrf')]);

switch($act) {
    case 'report':
        $id = intval($_POST['id'] ?? 0);
        $text = trim(strip_tags($_POST['text'] ?? ''));
        if(!$id || empty($text)) {
            jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_missing_data', 'Eksik veri.')]);
        }
        // Forum sınıfındaki mevcut reportPost fonksiyonunu çağırıyoruz
        jout($Forum->reportPost($id, $text));
        break;
    case 'like':
        $post_id = intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0);
        $ltype   = (isset($_POST['ltype']) && $_POST['ltype'] === 'dislike') ? 'dislike' : 'like';
        jout($Forum->toggleLike($post_id, $ltype));
        break;
    case 'follow':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->toggleFollow($topic_id));
        break;
    case 'mark_read':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        $post_id  = intval($_POST['post_id']  ?? 0);
        $Forum->markAsRead($topic_id, $post_id);
        jout(['success' => true]);
        break;
    case 'notif_count':
        jout(['count' => $Forum->countUnreadNotifs()]);
        break;
    case 'notifs':
        $Forum->markNotifsRead();
        $notifs = $Forum->getNotifs($Forum->getUserId(), 15);
        jout(['notifs' => $notifs]);
        break;
    case 'edit_post':
        $post_id  = intval($_POST['post_id']  ?? 0);
        $new_text = trim($_POST['text'] ?? '');
        jout($Forum->editPost($post_id, $new_text));
        break;
    case 'delete_post':
        $post_id = intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->deletePost($post_id));
        break;
    case 'delete_topic':
        if(!$Forum->canDo('delete_any')) jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]);
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        jout(['success' => $Forum->deleteTopic($topic_id)]);
        break;
    case 'lock_topic':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        $state    = intval($_POST['state']    ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->lockTopic($topic_id, $state));
        break;
    case 'pin_topic':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        $state    = intval($_POST['state']    ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->pinTopic($topic_id, $state));
        break;
    case 'send_pm':
        $to_name = (isset($_POST['to_user']) && is_string($_POST['to_user'])) ? trim($_POST['to_user']) : '';
        if(empty($to_name)) jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_pm_name')]);
        $to_row  = $db->super_query("SELECT user_id FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE name='" . $db->safesql($to_name) . "'");
        if(!$to_row) jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_user_not_found')]);
        $title = trim($_POST['title'] ?? '');
        $text  = trim($_POST['text']  ?? '');
        jout($Forum->sendPm($to_row['user_id'], $title, $text));
        break;
    /* case 'delete_pm' removed - dead code */
    case 'new_topic':
        $cat_id = intval($_POST['cat_id'] ?? 0);
        $title  = trim($_POST['title']    ?? '');
        $text   = trim($_POST['text']     ?? '');
        jout($Forum->createTopic($cat_id, $title, $text));
        break;
    case 'delete_attachment':
        $attach_id = intval($_POST['attach_id'] ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->deleteAttachment($attach_id));
        break;
    case 'download_attachment':
        $attach_id = intval($_POST['attach_id'] ?? 0);
        $Forum->incrementDownload($attach_id);
        jout(['success' => true]);
        break;
    case 'bump_topic':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->bumpTopic($topic_id));
        break;
    case 'move_topic':
        if(!$Forum->canDo('moderate')) jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]);
        jout($Forum->moveTopic(intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0), intval($_POST['new_cat_id'] ?? 0)));
        break;
    case 'upload':
        jout($Forum->handleUpload(intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0), intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0)));
        break;
    case 'approve_post':
        jout($Forum->approvePost(intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0)));
        break;
    case 'reject_post':
        jout($Forum->rejectPost(intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0)));
        break;
    case 'get_post':
        $post_id = intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? $_POST['id'] ?? 0);
        if(!$post_id) jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_post_not_found')]);
        $row = $db->super_query(
            "SELECT p.text, p.user_id, p.is_deleted, p.is_approved 
             FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p 
             WHERE p.id='{$post_id}' AND p.is_deleted='0'"
        );
        if(!$row) jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_post_not_found')]);

        // Alıntı modu: sadece giriş yapmış olmak yeterli, ek yetki gerekmez
        $mode = isset($_POST['mode']) ? $_POST['mode'] : 'edit';
        if($mode === 'quote') {
            jout(['success' => true, 'text' => $row['text']]);
        }

        // Düzenleme modu: kendi mesajı mı veya moderatör mü?
        $is_own = ($row['user_id'] == $member_id['user_id']);
        $is_mod = $Forum->canDo('moderate');

        // Admin paneli ayarından üye düzenleme yetkisi kontrolü
        $allow_member_edit = intval($Forum->getSetting('allow_member_edit') ?? 1);
        if(!$allow_member_edit && !$is_mod) {
            jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_no_edit_perm', 'Bu mesajı düzenleme yetkiniz yok!')]);
        }

        if(!$is_own && !$is_mod) {
            jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_no_edit_perm', 'Bu mesajı düzenleme yetkiniz yok!')]);
        }
        if(!$is_mod && !$row['is_approved']) {
            jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_no_edit_time', 'Onaylanmamış mesaj düzenlenemez.')]);
        }

        jout(['success' => true, 'text' => $row['text']]);
        break;
    default:
        jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_invalid_action')]);
}
?>

<?php
if(!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

$user_name = isset($_GET['user']) ? urldecode($_GET['user']) : '';
$user_name = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9ğĞüÜşŞıİöÖçÇ\s\-_]/', '', $user_name);

if(empty($user_name)) { msgbox(fl('forum_error'), fl('forum_err_user_not_found')); return; }

$user_row = $db->super_query("SELECT user_id, name, foto FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE name='" . $db->safesql($user_name) . "'");
if(!$user_row) { msgbox(fl('forum_error'), fl('forum_err_user_not_found')); return; }

$user_id  = intval($user_row['user_id']);
$page     = isset($_GET['page']) ? max(1, intval($_GET['page'])) : 1;
$per_page = 20;
$offset   = ($page - 1) * $per_page;

$base_url = rtrim($config['http_home_url'], '/') . '/';
$noavatar = $base_url . 'templates/' . $config['skin'] . '/dleimages/noavatar.png';
$user_avatar = !empty($user_row['foto']) ? $base_url . $user_row['foto'] : $noavatar;

$total_row   = $db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE user_id='$user_id' AND is_deleted='0'");
$total_count = intval($total_row['c']);

$posts = $db->super_query(
    "SELECT p.id, p.text, p.date, p.topic_id, t.title as topic_title, t.cat_id,
     c.name as cat_name, c.alt_name as cat_alt_name
     FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p
     LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t ON t.id = p.topic_id
     LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats c ON c.id = t.cat_id
     WHERE p.user_id='$user_id' AND p.is_deleted='0'
     ORDER BY p.date DESC LIMIT $offset, $per_page",
    true
);

// ============================================================
// POST DÖNGÜSÜ
// ============================================================
$tpl->load_template('forum/blocks/user_post_row.tpl');
$posts_html = '';

if(empty($posts)) {
    $tpl->load_template('forum/blocks/empty.tpl');
    $tpl->set('{empty_msg}', fl('forum_no_user_posts'));
    $tpl->compile('empty_block');
    $posts_html = $tpl->result['empty_block'];
    $tpl->load_template('forum/blocks/user_post_row.tpl');
} else {
    foreach($posts as $p) {
        $p_id       = intval($p['id']);
        $p_topic_id = intval($p['topic_id']);
        $p_date     = date('d.m.Y H:i', strtotime($p['date']));
        $p_title    = htmlspecialchars($p['topic_title'] ?: fl('forum_deleted_topic'));
        $p_cat_name = htmlspecialchars($p['cat_name'] ?: '-');
        $p_cat_url  = !empty($p['cat_alt_name']) ? forum_url('forum_cat', ['category' => $p['cat_alt_name']]) : '#';
        $p_text     = htmlspecialchars(mb_strimwidth(strip_tags(html_entity_decode($p['text'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8')), 0, 200, '...'));
        $post_url   = forum_url('forum_topic', ['newsid' => $p_topic_id]) . '#post-' . $p_id;

        $tpl->set('{post_url}',     $post_url);
        $tpl->set('{post_title}',   $p_title);
        $tpl->set('{cat_url}',      $p_cat_url);
        $tpl->set('{cat_name}',     $p_cat_name);
        $tpl->set('{post_date}',    $p_date);
        $tpl->set('{post_preview}', $p_text);

        $tpl->compile('user_post_row_block');
    }
    $posts_html = $tpl->result['user_post_row_block'];
}

// ============================================================
// SAYFALAMA - Forum::pagination() kullan
// ============================================================
$pagination = $Forum->pagination($total_count, $per_page, $page, forum_fix_url(forum_url('forum_user', ['user' => $user_name]), ''));

$tpl->load_template('forum/user_posts.tpl');
$tpl->set('{breadcrumb}',  $Forum->getBreadcrumb(0, 0, htmlspecialchars($user_name)));
$tpl->set('{user_name}',   htmlspecialchars($user_name));
$tpl->set('{user_avatar}', $user_avatar);
$tpl->set('{total_posts}', $total_count);
$tpl->set('{posts_list}',  $posts_html);
$tpl->set('{pagination}',  $pagination);
$tpl->set('{SITEURL}',     $config['http_home_url']);
$tpl->set('{forum_js_vars}', $Forum->getJsVars());
$tpl->compile('content');
$tpl->clear();
$metatags['title'] = htmlspecialchars($user_name) . ' - Forum Mesajları';
?>

<?php
if(!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

/**
 * forum_url() — Evrensel SEO Link Üretici
 * SEO URL aktifse DLE motorunu, kapalıysa standart parametreli linki döner.
 *
 * Kullanım örnekleri:
 *   forum_url('forum_main')
 *   forum_url('forum_cat',   ['category' => $alt_name])
 *   forum_url('forum_topic', ['newsid' => $id, 'news_name' => $slug, 'category' => $cat_alt])
 *   forum_url('forum_user',  ['user' => $username])
 *   forum_url('forum_pm_read', ['newsid' => $pm_id])
 */
function forum_url($rule, $params = []) {
    global $config;

    $mapping = [
        'forum_main'          => '',
        'forum_cat'           => '&action=category&cat='    . urlencode($params['category'] ?? ''),
        'forum_topic'         => '&action=topic&id='        . intval($params['newsid'] ?? 0),
        'forum_user'          => '&action=user_posts&user=' . urlencode($params['user'] ?? ''),
        'forum_new_topic'     => '&action=new_topic',
        'forum_search'        => '&action=search',
        'forum_notifications' => '&action=notifications',
        'forum_pm'            => '&action=pm',
        'forum_pm_read'       => '&action=pm&sub=read&id='  . intval($params['newsid'] ?? 0),
        'forum_ajax'          => '&action=ajax',
    ];

    if (empty($config['allow_alt_url']) || !class_exists('DLEUrl')) {
        return $config['http_home_url'] . 'index.php?do=forum' . ($mapping[$rule] ?? '');
    }

    $url = DLEUrl::BuildUrl('custom.' . $rule, $params);
    if (empty($url) || strpos($url, '{') !== false) {
        return $config['http_home_url'] . 'index.php?do=forum' . ($mapping[$rule] ?? '');
    }
    return $url;
}

/**
 * forum_fix_url() — Mevcut URL'e parametre ekler (& / ? otomatik seçer)
 */
function forum_fix_url($url, $param) {
    if (empty($url)) return '';
    $sep = (strpos($url, '?') === false) ? '?' : '&';
    return $url . $sep . $param;
}
?>

<?php
if(!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

// 1. Giriş ve ID Kontrolü
if(!$is_logged) { msgbox(fl('forum_error'), fl('forum_err_must_login')); return; }

$topic_id = intval($_GET['id'] ?? 0);
$topic    = $Forum->getTopicById($topic_id);

if(!$topic) { msgbox(fl('forum_error'), fl('forum_err_topic_not_found')); return; }

// 2. Yetki Kontrolü: Konu sahibi mi yoksa moderatör mü?
$is_owner = ($topic['user_id'] == $member_id['user_id']);
if(!$is_owner && !$Forum->canDo('moderate')) {
    msgbox(fl('forum_error'), fl('forum_err_no_perm_edit')); return;
}

if($topic['is_locked'] && !$Forum->canDo('moderate')) {
    msgbox(fl('forum_error'), fl('forum_err_topic_locked')); return;
}

// Konunun ilk mesajını (OP) bulmamız lazım
$first_post = $db->super_query("SELECT id, text FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE topic_id='$topic_id' ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1");
if(!$first_post) { msgbox(fl('forum_error'), "Konu icerigi bulunamadi."); return; }

$error = '';

// 3. Kaydetme İşlemi (POST)
if(isset($_POST['submit_edit'])) {
    if(!$Forum->verifyCsrf($_POST['csrf_token'] ?? '')) {
        $error = fl('forum_err_csrf_retry');
    } else {
        $title   = trim(strip_tags($_POST['topic_title'] ?? ''));
        $desc    = trim(strip_tags($_POST['topic_description'] ?? ''));
        $content = trim($_POST['comments'] ?? ''); // DLE editörü genelde 'comments' adını kullanır

        if(mb_strlen($title) < 3) {
            $error = fl('forum_err_title_len');
        } else {
            // Başlık, Açıklama ve Prefix Güncelleme
            $prefix_id = intval($_POST['prefix_id'] ?? 0);
            $db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET title='".$db->safesql($title)."', description='".$db->safesql($desc)."', prefix_id='$prefix_id' WHERE id='$topic_id'");

            // Mesaj İçeriğini Güncelle
            $Forum->editPost($first_post['id'], $content);

            // Etiketleri Güncelle
            $tags_raw = isset($_POST['tags']) ? trim($_POST['tags']) : '';
            $Forum->setTopicTags($topic_id, $tags_raw);

            // Dosya yükleme (v1.2.5)
            if(!empty($_FILES['forum_file']['name'][0])) {
                $Forum->handleUpload($first_post['id'], $topic_id);
            }

            // Başarılı, konuya geri dön
            header("Location: " . forum_url('forum_topic', ['newsid' => $topic_id]));
            exit;
        }
    }
}

// 4. Full Editörü Hazırla (WYSIWYG)
$parse = new ParseFilter();
$editor_html = "";
$id = 0; $dark_theme = '';
$row = ['short_story' => $first_post['text']]; // Editör içine mevcut mesajı koyuyoruz

include_once(DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/editor/shortsite.php'));
$editor_html = str_replace(['name="short_story"', 'id="short_story"'], ['name="comments"', 'id="comments"'], $shortarea);

// 5. Şablon Çıktısı
$tpl->load_template('forum/edit_topic.tpl');
$tpl->set('{title}', htmlspecialchars($topic['title']));
$tpl->set('{topic_title_val}', htmlspecialchars($topic['title']));
$tpl->set('{description_val}', htmlspecialchars($topic['description']));

// Mevcut etiketleri çek
$tags = $Forum->getTopicTags($topic_id);
$tags_str = $tags ? implode(', ', array_column($tags, 'name')) : '';
$tpl->set('{tags_val}', htmlspecialchars($tags_str));

// Prefix seçimi
$prefixes = $Forum->getPrefixes($topic['cat_id']);
$prefix_opts = '<option value="0">-- Önek Yok --</option>';
foreach(($prefixes ?: []) as $pf) {
    $sel = ($topic['prefix_id'] == $pf['id']) ? ' selected' : '';
    $prefix_opts .= '<option value="'.$pf['id'].'"'.$sel.'>'.htmlspecialchars($pf['title']).'</option>';
}
$tpl->set('{prefix_select}', '<select name="prefix_id" class="df-input">'.$prefix_opts.'</select>');

$tpl->set('{editor}', $editor_html);
$tpl->set('{csrf_token}', $Forum->csrfToken());
$tpl->set('{breadcrumb}', $Forum->getBreadcrumb($topic['cat_id'], $topic_id, "Konuyu Düzenle"));
$tpl->set('{forum_js_vars}', $Forum->getJsVars());
$tpl->set('{SITEURL}', $config['http_home_url']);

if($error) {
    $tpl->set('[error]', ''); $tpl->set('[/error]', '');
    $tpl->set('{error}', $error);
} else {
    $tpl->set_block("'\\[error\\](.*?)\\[/error\\]'si", "");
}

$tpl->compile('content');
$tpl->clear();
$metatags['title'] = "Konuyu Düzenle: " . $topic['title'];
?>
